creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Gmelin from comment #29)
> Hm, still seems like the change didn't catch on (js didn't change).

I do not understand the CONCATENATE_ASSETS setting in Constants.pm.  Turning
it to 0 did not have any effect.

But I did force-remove the concatenated .js file, and now it seems to work.

Please try to test it on bugstest.FreeBSD.org and see if it now works for you
as well.
